body.title: Finish SQLite removal — purge wild-0001.db construction + delete file
body.result: wild-0001.db purged (commit 9bfc31ae). Cortex(db_path=Path) → Cortex(instance_id=str|None). self.db_path → self._cache_key_id. 80+ files updated (production tools + lab seeds + conftest + tests). 4 SQLite files trashed: 2x102MB (live + archive) + hardlink twin + 724KB archive = ~205MB freed. paths.py + main.py docstrings refreshed. Backup habit string switched from tar wild-0001.db to pg_dump. Spike test clean: 106K memories accessible via Postgres. Full suite 4186/0/32skip in 98.66s. Lab archive seed scripts have dead DB_PATH constants — left for a future cleanup pass.
body.description:
D-sqlite-removal closed at test/migration layer but wild_igor/igor/paths.py:14, cortex.py, conftest.py:164, and 10+ tools still construct Cortex(db_path=... wild-0001.db). Postgres has been the canonical store since D126; the SQLite file is shadow-state. Per Akien 2026-05-01 (reorg § 4 #1): remove it; migrate if needed; be ready to debug.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/paths.py:14, wild_igor/igor/main.py, wild_igor/igor/cortex.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/* (10+), tests/conftest.py:164, tests/test_skill_filter.py, tests/test_skill_importer.py, tests/test_self_inspect.py, ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001/wild-0001.db (102MB delete), ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001/wild-0001.db.archive-20260324 (delete), ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001/archive-Igor-wild-0001.db (delete)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (CLAUDE.md), HIGH-inertia: cortex.py, paths.py, conftest.py — Akien-pre-approved 2026-05-01
**Scope boundary:** in — purge db_path=wild-0001.db construction sites, ensure all reads are Postgres-only, delete .db files; out — schema migration (already done at D126); out — Igor cognition logic changes
**Test plan:** verify pytest -x -q all green BEFORE delete; tools that constructed Cortex(db_path) accept Postgres connection; conftest fixture stops creating SQLite; spike-test Igor restart against deleted file (should raise nothing); CLAUDE.md blocklist line removed for this file
